# services

**Instance Property**

A list of a peripheral’s discovered services.

## Declaration

```swift
var services: [CBService]? { get }
```

## Discussion

Returns an array of services (represented by [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBService] objects) that successful call to the [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBPeripheral/discoverServices(_:)] method discovered. If you haven’t yet called the [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBPeripheral/discoverServices(_:)] method to discover the services of the peripheral, or if there was an error in doing so, the value of this property is `nil`.

## Discovering Services

- **discoverServices(_:)**: Discovers the specified services of the peripheral.
- **discoverIncludedServices(_:for:)**: Discovers the specified included services of a previously-discovered service.
